title: Marketplace Manager - Voylla Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Voylla Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Voylla Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Voylla Ventures Solutions:
Voylla Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla Ventures Solutions!
